plugin_context.path_or_brief: A runtime plugin needs a closeout packet structure check after a session closes.
plugin_context.summary: The brief names session-end-cleanup and quality-gatekeeper as existing components. [EXPLICIT]

candidates.name: handoff-packet-check
candidates.responsibility: This hook validates session handoff packets against required closeout sections.
candidates.rationale: The name matches the lifecycle artifact and bounded check. [INFERENCE]

candidates.name: session-handoff-audit
candidates.responsibility: This hook audits session handoff completeness after session close.
candidates.rationale: Clear alternate, but broader than packet structure validation. [INFERENCE]

conflict_analysis.rationale: quality-gatekeeper remains the general validation authority; this hook checks closeout packet structure only. [INFERENCE]

moat_depth.rationale: Lifecycle behavior needs compatibility reference and examples for pass/fail packet shapes. [INFERENCE]

validation: command/Stop is a compatible hook type and event pair. [CONFIG]
The conflict resolution differentiates the hook from quality-gatekeeper. [INFERENCE]
